title: CUDA kernel for ggml_dsv4_hc_weighted_sum (V4 CUDA port Stream B3)
blocked_by: hardware: no nvcc on Mac orchestrator

history.note: Plan + spec pre-written and pre-fixed with Stream A lessons (-b CPU,CUDA, count assertion). Stream A merged; B3 unblocked.

R1 REVISE: 5 items raised. Adopted: stricter supports_op type check (all of dst/src[0]/src[1]==F32); tolerance corrected 1e-4 -> 1e-5 (matches Stream A's test_dsv4_hc_weighted_sum::max_nmse_err at test-backend-ops.cpp:4937); include style 'ggml-cuda/dsv4-hc-weighted-sum.cuh' (matches existing convention at ggml-cuda.cu:25); count assertion now aggregates across backends via awk. REJECTED: Co-Authored-By trailer removal (this fork's CLAUDE.md mandates the trailer; overrides upstream AGENTS.md). Plan + agent spec updated. Log: /tmp/codex-v4-cuda-B-weighted-sum-pr.log

R2 REVISE: 1 new item - CMakeLists uses file(GLOB) without CONFIGURE_DEPENDS at ggml-cuda/CMakeLists.txt:104, so an already-configured build-cuda/ won't pick up the new .cu. Adopted: plan Task 4.3 now forces 'cmake -B build-cuda -DGGML_CUDA=ON ...' reconfigure before build, plus sanity check that dsv4-hc-weighted-sum.cu.o exists. Items 1/2/4/5 from R1 confirmed addressed. Log: /tmp/codex-v4-cuda-B-weighted-sum-pr2.log
R3 APPROVE: Task 4.2/4.3 reconfigure-and-verify-.o fix accepted. No new blockers. Plan-review complete. Log: /tmp/codex-v4-cuda-B-weighted-sum-pr3.log

Implemented Tasks 3-5 from the plan in worktree /Users/cchuter/work/llama.cpp.B-weighted-sum: new dsv4-hc-weighted-sum.{cu,cuh} (kernel + dispatch with 256-thread blocks, byte-stride addressing matching Metal/CPU), include + main switch case + supports_op arm in ggml-cuda.cu. 3 commits: c998175c5 (header), ed5ee3682 (kernel+dispatch), aec953b2c (register). Implementation done by inline orchestrator (no separate builder sub-agent tool available); isolation requirement satisfied by the dedicated worktree.

R1 APPROVE on code review by inspection: kernel matches Metal/CPU references for index decomposition (d=gid%n_embd, t=gid/n_embd), byte-stride addressing, FP32 loads/stores throughout, accumulation order (h=0..n_hc-1), launch bounds, dispatcher/supports_op registration. No blocking findings. Codex confirmed it could not compile/run (no nvcc on this Mac, as expected). Log: /tmp/codex-v4-cuda-B-weighted-sum-cr.log

HARDWARE BLOCKER: orchestrator running on arm64 darwin Mac with no nvcc. 'cmake -B build-cuda -DGGML_CUDA=ON' would fail at configure. Gate command must run on RTX 6000 Ada / RTX 5090 hardware. Per orchestrator brief: kernel is implemented + code-reviewed (codex APPROVE on inspection); not faking the gate. Branch pushed to remote 'mine' per PR_BEHAVIOR=internal-merge; will fast-forward into feat/v4-port-cuda only after gate-tools/test-backend-ops PASSES on hardware. Expected gate: './build-cuda/bin/test-backend-ops -o DSV4_HC_WEIGHTED_SUM' with aggregate COUNT>=3, max_nmse_err<=1e-5 vs CPU.
